page_metadata.biotools__summary: Java command line program which counts overrepresented 8-14bp oligonucleotides in DNA sequences. These oligos can be useful in visualising small genomes on a global basis (see figure below), investigating repeats at certain regions, and for attributing short reads (for example from metagenomics) to a sequenced genome.

These oligos can be useful in visualising small genomes on a global basis (see figure below), investigating repeats at certain regions, and for attributing short reads (for example from metagenomics) to a sequenced genome.
